name: canDisturbanceFrameSequence::SetMessage
title: canDisturbanceFrameSequence::SetMessage
description: Configures the output sequence based on the frame msg.
All CanDisturbanceBitSequence objects in all fields of this frame sequence are overridden by a sequence that corresponds to the bits the frame.

parameters.name: deviceID
parameters.description: The device ID of the CAN Disturbance Interface.
